title: Tama’s Kidnapping Exposes Wano’s Cruelty
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Tsuru, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Speed, Unknown person #4 as Luffy and Zoro push into Kuri and Bakura Town as Tama’s kidnapping exposes the cruelty of the Beast Pirates.
scene: Luffy and Zoro move through Kuri and Bakura Town while Tama’s kidnapping pulls them into open conflict with the Beast Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hush! You're unsightly to look at!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You are a man that hails from the Wano Country!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You absolutely cannot show any weakness!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Do you have any jyagan grass?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My child... could not endure his hunger. He drank the river water in order to date it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Fill up two of the Harvesters!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Leave immediately out the back gate!! Go back to Okobore Town!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please, I need more... There's no way my family can survive the rest of the week with this.....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We won't be able to afford enough clean water!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've got a great assortment of yummy food today too!! Hihin! c)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right, Master speed. Please take a look. The food is over here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's because my field of vision....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Just what I expected from a horse!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: She smiles just like a horse, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Team one will handle the fire!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hurry up and put out the fire!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What's with that path of destruction!?

dialogue.speaker: Speed
dialogue.text: It's coming from over there, Master Speed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There was supposed to be a Sumo tournament in town today....!!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kuri storyline with 47 dialogue beats. The rescue of Tama brings Luffy, Zoro, Kiku, and Law into direct contact with Wano’s local oppression.
